text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Weight Management Support Groups 5 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF GOOD SAMARITAN MINISTRIES INTERNATIONAL HEADQUARTERS GSM BEAVERTON GROUPS AND CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides faith-based group classes on a variety of topics, including anger management, men’s group, mutual support group, and body image and weight management. 7929 SW Cirrus Drive Beaverton, OR 97008 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by group or class Email (503) 644-2339 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HILLSBORO MEDICAL CENTER HEALTH EDUCATION CENTER COMMUNITY EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Hillsboro Medical Center offers a variety of community education classes. Classes include childbirth education, newborn care, infant massage, breastfeeding support, and CPR & first aid classes. 334 SE 8th Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Class and support group times vary and may include the evening and weekends. Email (503) 681-1700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIVING HOPE CHURCH LIVING FREE MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Christian faith-based support groups and classes for individuals experiencing addiction to alcohol, drugs, food, or pornography, as well as for those dealing with anger, depression, grief, and divorce. Offers Beyond the Walls, a class for families with loved ones who are incarcerated. Child care is available for support groups and classes. Also provides a community meal. Worship services are offered but are not required for participation. 2711 NE Andresen Road Vancouver, WA 98661 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Community meal: Tuesday 5:30pm -Support groups: 7:20pm, support group times vary -Worship service: Tuesday 6:30pm-7:20pm Email (360) 944-3905 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OVEREATERS ANONYMOUS REGION ONE OVEREATERS ANONYMOUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Overeaters Anonymous is a 12-step program of recovery for compulsive eating, anorexia, and bulimia. All who struggle with food and eating issues are welcome.
